Upcoming Events
echaillet@aol.com
2026-06-05T23:03:11+01:00
IMPORTANT!
YOU MUST BE A MEMBER OF THE IPA TO COMPETE. THOSE WITHOUT AN ACTIVE MEMBERSHIP THE DAY OF COMPETITION WILL NOT BE INCLUDED IN THE RESULTS.
MEMBERSHIPS PURCHASED AFTER THE MEET DATE
ARE NOT RETROACTIVE TO THE DATE OF COMPETITION.
2026 IPA CONNECTICUT IRONMAN PUSH/PULL SHOWDOWN
May 2, 2026
Powerhouse Gym, 31 Bernhard Rd., New Haven, CT  06473
Meet Director:
Mark Hogan, (203) 623-6456,
mhogan@promednutrition.com
Entry Fee:  $90
GENERAL INFORMATION & REGISTRATION
ALL IPA MEMBERS ARE ELIGIBLE TO SET OR BREAK IPA WORLD RECORDS!
IMPORTANT! You must be a member of the IPA to compete. Membership cards WILL NOT be sold at the meet site. You must purchase your membership in advance either online or by mail. Those without an active membership the day of the competition will not be included in the results. Memberships are not retroactive to the date of the competition.
For a membership application please visit our
Join the IPA page.

Time:
9:00 am

ALL IPA MEMBERS ARE ELIGIBLE TO SET OR BREAK IPA WORLD RECORDS!
IMPORTANT! You must be a member of the IPA to compete. Membership cards WILL NOT be sold at the meet site. You must purchase your membership in advance either online or by mail. Those without an active membership the day of the competition will not be included in the results. Memberships are not retroactive to the date of the competition.
For a membership application please visit our
Join the IPA page.

Search for:
Recent Posts
The date is set for the IPA Worlds.  The meet will be held on Saturday and Sunday, December 12 & 13, 2026.  The meet will be held at I-4 Fitness in Orlando.  Cash prizes for the Pros will be substantial.  For more information contact Andy Polk, polk17@gmail.com.
IPA President, FRED FISCHER, set a new “ALL TIME” World Record in the bench press at the Hillbilly Havoc 4 Power Meet in Hurricane, WV.  Fred’s bench of 639.3 lbs. is the most weight lifted for all weight classes in the (70-74) age group.
Everyone, please note that an IPA meet lift posted on the internet does not always mean the lift is a good lift.  Questionable lifts brought to our attention will be disallowed and not be posted as records on the IPA website or with OPEN POWERLIFTING.  In addition, a blatant disregard of the rules may result in decertification of the meet director and judges.
The IPA is planning on having our World Championships in early December 2026.  Major sponsor will be Fischer Financial Services, Inc.  There will be significant amount of prize money for the professional lifters.
Congratulations to Zack Marstiller.  Zack will be replacing Matt Brooks as the new State Chair of Tennessee.  Matt will continue as Director of U.S. Relations.
